title: $100M New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
summary: James Patten, defendant in a $100 million New Jersey deli fraud scheme that artificially inflated a company's market value, is seeking to avoid prison time despite a prior conviction. The unusual case reveals how fraud schemes involving small companies can create outsized market manipulation.
content: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.

zh.title: $1亿美元新泽西熟食欺诈案被告Patten尽管有前科仍要求不入狱
zh.summary: 被控$1亿美元新泽西州熟食欺诈案的詹姆斯·帕顿虽有前科但仍寻求避免监禁。这一不寻常案件揭示了涉及小公司的欺诈计划如何造成过度市场操纵。

title: Celebrity influencers paid up to £1m to advertise deodorant on Instagram
summary: Celebrity influencers are commanding payments of up to £1 million to promote deodorant brands through Instagram posts, revealing the lucrative scale of influencer marketing. The behind-the-scenes economics expose the high costs brands pay for digital reach and consumer engagement.
content: The chief executive of Wild reveals what happens behind the scenes of social media posts.

zh.title: 名人影响者在Instagram上宣传除臭剂可获得高达100万英镑报酬
zh.summary: 名人影响者通过Instagram帖子宣传除臭品牌可获得高达100万英镑报酬，揭示了影响者营销的利润规模。幕后经济学分析表明品牌为获得数字覆盖和消费者参与而支付的高额成本。

title: ‘I don’t want to sound callous’: Why base your Social Security claim on life expectancy? We could die at any time.
summary: Financial advisors are questioning whether life expectancy statistics should guide Social Security claiming decisions, noting that death can occur at any time. The traditional approach of optimizing claim timing based on actuarial data may overlook individual circumstances and survivor benefits.
content: “The actual date of death ultimately affects only the surviving beneficiaries.”

zh.title: "我不想显得冷漠"：为什么要基于预期寿命来决定社保索赔？我们随时可能死亡。
zh.summary: 财务顾问质疑预期寿命统计数据是否应该指导社保索赔决策，指出死亡可能随时发生。基于精算数据优化索赔时机的传统方法可能会忽视个人情况和遗属福利。

title: Jim Cramer says he needs 'cold hard' proof that AI is paying off
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer is demanding concrete financial evidence that companies' AI investments are generating measurable returns, reflecting broader investor skepticism. Companies claiming AI-driven value creation face increasing scrutiny over delivering tangible results and profit growth.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he’s looking for companies to start showing measurable financial returns from their AI investments.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默说他需要"确凿证据"证明人工智能是否有回报
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默要求提供具体的财务证据证明公司的人工智能投资产生可衡量的回报，反映了更广泛的投资者怀疑态度。声称由人工智能驱动的价值创造的公司面临越来越多的审查压力，要求提供切实的成果和利润增长。

title: Fed Chairman Warsh says he meets 'often' with Trump administration, defends independence
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh says he meets frequently with Trump administration officials while defending the central bank's independence. The statements reveal close communication between the Fed and the White House, indicating coordination between monetary and fiscal authorities.
content: Kevin Warsh said Wednesday that he speaks with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent frequently outside their regular weekly meetings.

zh.title: 美联储主席沃什说他"经常"与特朗普政府会面，为独立性进行辩护
zh.summary: 美联储主席凯文·沃什表示他经常与特朗普政府官员会面，同时为美联储的独立性进行辩护。这些声明显示美联储与白宫之间进行了密切沟通，表明货币政策和财政政策当局之间存在协调。

title: Buffett calls Bill Gates relationship with Epstein 'distasteful'
summary: Warren Buffett has characterized Bill Gates' relationship with Jeffrey Epstein as "distasteful," and Berkshire Hathaway has halted donations to the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation. The rift signals deteriorating relations between the two major philanthropists and represents a significant loss for the charitable organization.
content: The billionaire investor's firm has stopped giving donations to the Microsoft co-founder's charity.

zh.title: 巴菲特称盖茨与爱泼斯坦的关系"令人厌恶"
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特称比尔·盖茨与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的关系"令人厌恶"，伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司已停止向比尔与梅琳达·盖茨基金会的捐赠。这一裂痕表明这两位主要慈善家之间的关系在恶化，也代表了该慈善机构的重大损失。

title: You are missing the bond deal of the decade — and it is guaranteed to beat inflation
summary: TIPS (Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities) are offering rare generous returns that can beat inflation, providing investors an opportunity to lock in inflation-adjusted gains. The bond market is currently presenting an uncommon opportunity for real yield investors seeking inflation protection.
content: TIPS are offering a rare gift — and it is time to lock in a generous payout.

zh.title: 你错过了十年来最好的债券交易——它保证能跑赢通胀
zh.summary: 美国国债保值债券(TIPS)提供罕见的慷慨回报，可以战胜通胀，为投资者提供了锁定通胀调整收益的机会。债券市场目前为寻求通胀保护的实际收益投资者提供了不常见的机会。

title: Small-cap outperformance is persisting — and these 15 quality stocks pay rich dividends
summary: Small-cap stocks have continued to outperform large-cap stocks, with high-quality dividend-paying small-caps offering compelling value propositions. The trend challenges conventional wisdom favoring large-cap exposure and suggests dividend-focused small-cap investors are finding better opportunities.
content: Think large caps are still the best bet? The data say you are looking in the wrong place.

zh.title: 小市值股票持续跑赢——这15只优质股票支付丰厚股息
zh.summary: 小市值股票继续跑赢大市值股票，高质量的派息小市值股提供了令人信服的价值主张。这一趋势挑战了偏好大市值敞口的传统智慧，表明专注于派息的小市值投资者正在找到更好的机会。

title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh testified before the House Financial Services Committee on the state of the economy and interest rate policy, fulfilling a congressional mandate for central bank leadership appearances. His remarks addressed current economic conditions and the Federal Reserve's monetary policy direction.
content: Part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House Financial Services Committee.

zh.title: 沃什联储主席在参议院银行委员会作证 关于经济和利率政策
zh.summary: 沃什联储主席在众议院金融服务委员会就经济状况和利率政策作证，履行国会对中央银行领导层出庭作证的授权。他的讲话涉及当前经济状况和美联储的货币政策方向。

title: Trump's DNI pick Jay Clayton won't tell senators Biden won the 2020 election
summary: Jay Clayton, President Trump's nominee for director of national intelligence, refused to acknowledge that President Biden won the 2020 election during Senate Intelligence Committee questioning. The response raises concerns among senators evaluating his nomination for the intelligence leadership position.
content: The Senate Intelligence Committee is considering Jay Clayton's nomination to be the director of national of intelligence.

zh.title: 特朗普提名的国家情报主任人选克莱顿拒绝向参议员承认拜登赢得2020年大选
zh.summary: 特朗普提名为国家情报总监的人选杰伊·克莱顿在参议院情报委员会质询中拒绝承认拜登赢得2020年大选。这一回应引发了评估其国情主任提名的参议员们的担忧。

title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
summary: A woman discovered that her mother's bank account was restricted following her death, resulting in unauthorized withdrawals that depleted the balance from $16,000 to $9,000. The incident raises questions about bank procedures for handling accounts after account holders pass away.
content: “Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000.”

zh.title: "他们切断了在线访问"：我母亲去世后银行账户余额大幅下降。发生了什么？
zh.summary: 一名女性发现她母亲去世后银行账户被冻结，导致未经授权的提款将账户余额从16000美元降至9000美元。这一事件引发了人们对银行在账户持有人去世后处理账户程序的质疑。

title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
summary: AI tools are reducing the relevance of traditional cover letters in job applications, making the hiring process more standardized but potentially disadvantageous for non-AI companies. However, specific scenarios remain where a well-crafted cover letter can still benefit job seekers.
content: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken.”

zh.title: AI 正在杀死求职信——但什么时候仍然值得写一份
zh.summary: AI 工具正在降低传统求职信在求职申请中的相关性，使招聘流程更加标准化，但对于非 AI 公司可能不利。然而，在某些特定情况下，精心撰写的求职信仍然可以使求职者受益。

title: Salary information to be shown on job ads under new laws
summary: New government regulations will require employers to display salary information in job advertisements to increase transparency and help jobseekers. The requirement is expected to reduce pay discrimination and provide workers with better information when evaluating job opportunities.
content: The government argues the move would help jobseekers and could reduce pay discrimination claims.

zh.title: 新法律规定招聘广告中必须显示薪资信息
zh.summary: 新的政府规定将要求雇主在招聘广告中显示薪资信息，以提高透明度并帮助求职者。该规定预计将减少薪资歧视，并在求职者评估工作机会时为他们提供更好的信息。

title: IBM employees losing $400 million on the company’s stock should be a wake-up call
summary: IBM employees have collectively lost $400 million in stock value, highlighting the risks of over-concentrating company stock in personal investment portfolios. The situation underscores the importance of diversification in retirement and investment planning.
content: Don’t put all your eggs in one basket

zh.title: IBM 员工在公司股票上损失 4 亿美元应该敲响警钟
zh.summary: IBM 员工在股票价值上集体损失了 4 亿美元，突出了在个人投资组合中过度集中公司股票的风险。这种情况强调了在退休和投资规划中多元化的重要性。

title: Why Jim Cramer is shocked by Citi's against-the-grain praise of Microsoft's Copilot
summary: Jim Cramer expressed surprise at Citibank's optimistic assessment of Microsoft's Copilot AI tool, which contradicts widespread industry skepticism about the product's performance. The rare positive analysis from a major financial institution stands out against largely critical feedback from other market observers.
content: Jim Cramer said on CNBC on Wednesday that Citi's optimism is contrary to everything he has been hearing about Copilot being subpar.

zh.title: 为什么吉姆·克拉默对花旗银行对微软Copilot的逆势看好感到震惊
zh.summary: 吉姆·克拉默对花旗银行对微软Copilot人工智能工具的乐观评估表示惊讶，这与业界对该产品性能的广泛怀疑相悖。这家主要金融机构的罕见正面分析与其他市场观察者的大量批评反馈形成鲜明对比。

title: Amazon senior cloud executive departs after 18 years
summary: A senior Amazon Web Services executive departed after 18 years with the company, having played a key role in launching some of AWS's foundational services and leading its compute and machine learning divisions. The departure represents a significant loss of institutional knowledge from the cloud computing division.
content: Brown helped launch one of AWS' oldest services and also oversaw its compute and machine learning units.

zh.title: 亚马逊资深云计算高管在任职18年后离职
zh.summary: 一位亚马逊网络服务公司(AWS)资深高管在与公司共事18年后离职，他在推出AWS多项基础服务和领导其计算与机器学习部门方面发挥了关键作用。这次离职代表着云计算部门机构知识的重大损失。

title: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
summary: SpaceX's stock price has fallen below its initial public offering price following volatile trading in the month since the company's market debut. The decline reflects broader market uncertainty about the aerospace company's valuation.
content: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.

zh.title: SpaceX股价跌至首次公开募股价格以下
zh.summary: SpaceX的股价在公司上市后一个月的波动性交易中已跌至其首次公开募股价格以下。这次下跌反映了市场对这家航空航天公司估值的广泛不确定性。

title: A big dividend cut and a $2 billion charge: Conagra’s results signal more pain ahead for food industry
summary: Conagra Brands reported disappointing results including a significant dividend cut and a $2 billion charge, signaling continued struggles within the packaged food industry. The company's guidance and financial metrics suggest further challenges ahead for major food manufacturers.
content: Conagra Brands’ stock was up a bit on Thursday, but the company’s results and forecast were the latest dose of bad news for the packaged-food industry.

zh.title: 大幅减少分红和20亿美元支出：康尼格拉的业绩预示食品行业面临更多困难
zh.summary: 康尼格拉品牌公司公布令人失望的业绩，包括大幅削减分红和20亿美元支出，预示加工食品行业持续面临困境。该公司的前景指引和财务指标表明主要食品制造商将面临进一步的挑战。

title: See if you qualify for Fidelity's $2.5M data breach settlement and learn how to fight identity theft
summary: Fidelity is offering a $2.5 million settlement for customers affected by a data breach, with eligible victims potentially receiving up to $5,000 in compensation. The settlement includes resources to help customers protect themselves against identity theft.
content: Eligible customers could receive as much as $5,000 from investment giant Fidelity.

zh.title: 查看您是否符合富达250万美元数据泄露和解资格，并了解如何防止身份盗窃
zh.summary: 富达为受数据泄露影响的客户提供250万美元的和解金，符合条件的受害者可能获得高达5000美元的赔偿。该和解包括帮助客户保护自己免受身份盗窃的资源。

title: What the launch of SK Hynix leveraged ETFs tells us about the hottest trade on Wall Street
summary: The introduction of leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking SK Hynix demonstrates strong investor enthusiasm for the semiconductor memory sector. The new investment vehicles reflect growing demand for exposure to the high-performing chipmaker industry.
content: Investors are still enthusiastic about the memory boom, and are looking for new ways to cash in.

zh.title: SK海力士杠杆交易所交易基金的推出告诉我们华尔街最火热的交易是什么
zh.summary: 追踪SK海力士的杠杆型交易所交易基金的推出表明投资者对半导体存储行业的强烈兴趣。这些新的投资工具反映了对高性能芯片制造商行业敞口的需求增长。

title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
summary: A retired couple is questioning whether their 30-something financial adviser's casual language represents unprofessionalism and is considering switching to an adviser closer to their age. The inquiry raises broader questions about professional communication standards in the financial services industry.
content: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

zh.title: 我和丈夫已退休。我们30多岁的财务顾问称呼我们"you guyses"。这不专业吗?
zh.summary: 一对退休夫妇质疑他们30多岁财务顾问的随意语言是否代表不专业，并考虑转向年纪更接近的顾问。这个询问提出了关于金融服务业专业沟通标准的更广泛问题。

title: Public Service Loan Forgiveness has new rules — 3 changes borrowers should know about
summary: Recent regulatory changes to the Public Service Loan Forgiveness program have introduced new eligibility requirements that borrowers need to understand. Affected borrowers should review their repayment plans and loan types to ensure they remain eligible for the forgiveness program.
content: Recent changes to Public Service Loan Forgiveness should prompt borrowers to confirm that their repayment plan and loan type remain eligible for the relief.

zh.title: 公共服务贷款豁免计划有新规则——借款人应该了解的3项变化
zh.summary: 公共服务贷款豁免计划的最近监管变化引入了借款人需要理解的新资格要求。受影响的借款人应该审查他们的还款计划和贷款类型，以确保他们仍然符合贷款豁免计划的资格。

title: Permanent daylight-saving time would be a win for tourism, but other sectors have big concerns
summary: Proponents of permanent daylight-saving time point to potential economic benefits for the tourism sector through increased time for outdoor recreational activities. However, other industries have raised concerns about the impact of the time change on their operations and workers.
content: One lawmaker points to benefits such as more time to do “outdoor leisure activities.”

zh.title: 永久性夏令时对旅游业来说是一场胜利，但其他部门有很大的担忧
zh.summary: 永久性夏令时的支持者指出通过增加户外娱乐活动的时间可能为旅游业带来的经济效益。然而，其他行业对时间变化对其运营和员工的影响表示担忧。

title: Morgan Stanley posts record quarterly revenue and profit as equities trading surges 69%
summary: Morgan Stanley achieved record quarterly results driven by a 69% surge in equities trading, matching strong performance from Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase. The outsized results reflect robust activity across Wall Street's trading operations.
content: Like at peers Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase, a massive beat in equities trading drove the quarter's outsized results.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利第一季度收入和利润创纪录，股票交易暴涨69%
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利以69%的股票交易增长率创下季度纪录，与高盛和摩根大通的强劲表现相媲美。这些超常的结果反映了华尔街交易业务的强劲活动。

title: This Wall Street ‘theme-o-meter’ has a clear message: The artificial-intelligence bull market is back
summary: UBS's market sentiment indicator signals that artificial intelligence stocks are regaining leadership, with earnings season potentially showing investors have been overly pessimistic on AI valuations. The shift suggests renewed confidence in the sector after recent weakness.
content: UBS says its top theme right now is that leadership for artificial-intelligence stocks is returning, and earnings season may prove how investors have been too pessimistic.

zh.title: 华尔街的"主题指标"传递了一个明确信号：人工智能牛市回归
zh.summary: UBS的市场情绪指标表明人工智能股票正在重获领导地位，财报季可能表明投资者对人工智能估值过度悲观。这种转变表明该领域在近期疲软后恢复了信心。

title: The earnings season has kicked off. Can companies meet the high bar that's been set?
summary: Corporate earnings season commenced with all major banks exceeding expectations, establishing a high performance benchmark for the quarter. Early strong results raise questions about whether companies across sectors can sustain this momentum.
content: The corporate earnings season really got underway this week, with all the big banks reporting better-than-expected results across the board.

zh.title: 财报季已启动。企业能否达到设定的高目标？
zh.summary: 企业财报季开始，所有主要银行都超过了预期，为本季度树立了高业绩基准。早期的强劲结果引发了人们对各个部门的企业是否能保持这一势头的疑问。

title: Wholesale prices show first drop in almost a year on lower gas prices, but inflation still too high
summary: Wholesale prices dropped in June for the first time in 10 months, primarily driven by lower gasoline prices, though overall inflation remains elevated. The longevity of this slowdown remains uncertain given renewed U.S.-Iran tensions affecting energy markets.
content: Wholesale prices fell in June for the first time in 10 months largely due to lower gas prices, but it is unclear if the recent slowdown in inflation will  persist in light of renewed hostilities between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 批发价格因油价下降首次下跌近一年，但通胀仍然过高
zh.summary: 六月批发价格创10个月来首次下跌，主要由汽油价格下降推动，但总体通胀仍保持高位。鉴于美国-伊朗关系紧张加剧对能源市场的影响，这一放缓的持久性仍不确定。

title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano will lead Trump accounts expansion
summary: IRS Chief Frank Bisignano has been appointed to lead a Treasury Department initiative enrolling millions of families in new government accounts. The appointment underscores the program's significance and scope.
content: The Treasury Department is putting a top official in charge of the new program as it enrolls millions of families.

zh.title: 国税局局长弗兰克·比西尼亚诺将领导特朗普政府账户扩展计划
zh.summary: 国税局局长弗兰克·比西尼亚诺已被任命领导财政部的一项计划，该计划将使数百万家庭注册新政府账户。这一任命强调了该计划的重要意义和范围。

title: 'Miracle on the Hudson' pilot has early-stage Alzheimer’s disease
summary: Chesley "Sully" Sullenberger, the pilot who emergency-landed an Airbus A320 on the Hudson River in 2009 and saved all 155 aboard, has been diagnosed with early-stage Alzheimer's disease. The diagnosis affects the celebrated aviation figure nearly two decades after his famous emergency landing.
content: C.B. "Sully" Sullenberger safely landed an Airbus A320 on New York's Hudson River in 2009 after hitting a flock of geese, saving all 155 on board.

zh.title: "哈德逊河奇迹"飞行员被诊断患有早期阿尔茨海默病
zh.summary: 切斯利·"萨利"·萨伦伯格是2009年在哈德逊河上紧急迫降空客A320飞机并拯救了船上所有155人的飞行员，他已被诊断为早期阿尔茨海默病。这一诊断影响了这位著名航空人物，距他著名的应急迫降已近二十年。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
summary: Market strategist Jim Cramer identifies key developments driving market sentiment, including ASML's strong quarterly performance and softer-than-expected wholesale inflation data. These signals are influencing investor positioning and broader market trends.
content: ASML delivered a blowout quarter, and the June wholesale inflation report was softer than expected.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默：周三股市值得关注的十大事项
zh.summary: 市场策略师吉姆·克莱默指出了驱动市场情绪的关键发展，包括阿斯麦的强劲季度表现和低于预期的批发通胀数据。这些信号正在影响投资者配置和更广泛的市场趋势。

title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
summary: Wholesale prices fell 0.3% in June as gasoline prices declined significantly, mirroring weakness in consumer prices. The decrease was supported by easing energy costs following the temporary de-escalation of U.S.-Iran tensions.
content: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 六月份批发价格意外下跌0.3%，汽油价格大幅下降
zh.summary: 六月份批发价格下跌0.3%，因汽油价格显著下降，反映消费价格的疲软。这一下降得益于美伊紧张局势临时缓解后能源成本的下降。

title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
summary: Warren Buffett criticized current market conditions as increasingly driven by speculation rather than fundamental value investing, making it difficult to identify quality investment opportunities. His comments highlight concerns about market valuation excesses and short-term trading dominance.
content: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

zh.title: 沃伦·巴菲特谈当今市场："当所有人都倾向于赌博时，很难找到价值"
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特批评当前市场状况越来越多地由投机驱动，而非基本面价值投资，使得难以识别高质量的投资机会。他的评论强调了对市场估值过度和短期交易主导的担忧。

title: Warren Buffett tells CNBC he initiated Berkshire Hathaway's investment in Alphabet
summary: Warren Buffett confirmed he personally initiated Berkshire Hathaway's recent significant investment in Alphabet, signaling his confidence in the tech giant. The move demonstrates Buffett's willingness to deploy capital in technology despite his historical preference for traditional businesses.
content: Warren Buffett said he was the driving force behind the conglomerate's recent big investment in Alphabet.

zh.title: 沃伦·巴菲特告诉CNBC他启动了伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司对谷歌母公司的投资
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特确认他亲自启动了伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司最近对谷歌母公司的重大投资，表明他对这家科技巨头的信心。此举表明巴菲特愿意在科技领域部署资本，尽管他历来偏好传统业务。

title: Trump's attorney general nominee Todd Blanche faces Senate Judiciary questions
summary: Todd Blanche, Trump's attorney general nominee and former criminal defense attorney for President Trump, faces Senate Judiciary Committee questioning during his confirmation process. His background as Trump's legal counsel is a focal point of the hearing.
content: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普的司法部长提名人托德·布兰切面临参议院司法委员会的质询
zh.summary: 托德·布兰切是特朗普的司法部长提名人，也是特朗普总统的前刑事辩护律师，他在确认程序中面临参议院司法委员会的质询。他作为特朗普法律顾问的背景是本次听证会的焦点。

title: Treasury yields are flat as traders weigh encouraging inflation data vs. oil rebound
summary: Treasury yields held flat as traders balanced encouraging inflation data against rising oil prices following the latest economic reports. The market awaits June producer price inflation data to provide direction for future yield movements.
content: Treasury yields were edged higher as investors awaited the latest producer price inflation print for June.

zh.title: 当交易员权衡令人鼓舞的通胀数据与油价反弹之际，美国国债收益率持平
zh.summary: 随着最新经济报告的发布，交易员在令人鼓舞的通胀数据和油价上升之间进行权衡，美国国债收益率保持平稳。市场等待6月生产者价格通胀数据为未来收益率走向提供方向。

title: This AI chipmaker is a double in three months. UBS sees more momentum ahead
summary: Advanced Micro Devices has doubled in value over three months, with UBS analysts predicting continued appreciation as the chipmaker's semiconductor businesses expand and attract new customers. The positive outlook reflects growing demand in AI-related chip markets.
content: Advanced Micro Devices is likely to appreciate further as its semiconductor chip businesses expand and attracts more customers, according to UBS.

zh.title: 这家AI芯片制造商三个月内翻倍。瑞银看好后续动能
zh.summary: Advanced Micro Devices在三个月内股价翻倍，瑞银分析师预测随着该芯片制造商半导体业务扩展并吸引新客户，股价将继续上升。这种积极前景反映了AI相关芯片市场日益增长的需求。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, SpaceX, Tesla, Cava, AMD, Palantir, Microsoft & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant recommendations on major technology companies and other equities on Wednesday, including Nvidia, SpaceX, Tesla, and Microsoft. These calls provide market signals across technology and broader sectors.
content: Here are Wednesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周三最重要的分析师评级：英伟达、SpaceX、特斯拉、Cava、AMD、Palantir、微软等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周三对包括英伟达、SpaceX、特斯拉和微软在内的主要科技公司和其他股票发布了重要评级建议。这些评级为科技和更广泛的行业提供了市场信号。

title: Americans say they need $1.2 million to retire comfortably, survey finds — but many expect to fall short
summary: A new survey shows Americans believe they need $1.2 million for comfortable retirement, yet only 30% of workplace plan investors expect to accumulate even $1 million before retiring. The gap reflects widespread concerns about adequate retirement savings and long-term financial security.
content: Just 30% of workplace retirement plan investors think they'll reach $1 million before retiring, a new survey finds. Here's what's getting in their way.

zh.title: 美国人称需要120万美元才能舒适退休，调查发现——但许多人预期达不到
zh.summary: 一项新调查显示，美国人认为需要120万美元才能舒适退休，但只有30%的工作场所计划投资者期望在退休前积累100万美元。这一差距反映了对充足退休储蓄和长期财务安全的广泛担忧。

title: Thames Water returns to profit after raising bills
summary: The UK's largest water company reported a post-tax profit for the 12 months to March, though its net debt increased significantly. The result highlights the challenging financial position of essential utilities despite raising customer bills.
content: The UK's largest water company reported a post-tax profit for the 12 months to the end of March, but its net debt also swelled.

zh.title: 泰晤士水务在上调账单后恢复盈利
zh.summary: 英国最大的水务公司报告了截至3月的12个月税后利润，尽管其净债务大幅增加。这一结果突显了必需公用事业公司尽管提高客户账单但仍面临的具有挑战性的财务状况。

title: ASML jumps over 7% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
summary: ASML raised its sales guidance for the second time in 2026 as customers accelerate production of AI chips in response to surging demand. The chipmaking equipment supplier's performance reflects sustained confidence in AI infrastructure growth.
content: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.

zh.title: 受强劲AI芯片需求推动，ASML在第二次提高今年销售预测后股价上涨超7%
zh.summary: ASML在2026年第二次提高销售指导，原因是客户加快AI芯片生产以应对激增的需求。这家芯片制造设备供应商的表现反映了对AI基础设施增长的持续信心。

title: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
summary: Trump threatened military strikes against Iranian infrastructure as the US and Iran engaged in their fourth consecutive day of military exchanges, with the US also reinstating a naval blockade on Iranian ports. The escalating rhetoric marks a critical moment in US-Iran tensions.
content: Trump's comments aired as the two countries exchanged fire for the fourth day in a row and the US resumed blockading Iranian ports.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁轰炸桥梁和发电厂，除非伊朗恢复谈判
zh.summary: 特朗普威胁对伊朗基础设施进行军事打击，此时美国和伊朗正进行连续第四天的军事交火，美国还重新实施了对伊朗港口的海军封锁。这一升级的言论标志着美伊紧张局势的一个关键时刻。

title: Oil rises after another round of U.S. strikes against Iran, naval blockade of the country's ports
summary: Oil prices rose following new US military strikes on Tehran and the reinstatement of a naval blockade on Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz. The military escalation creates supply disruption concerns in a critical energy chokepoint.
content: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国再次打击伊朗、对其港口实施海上封锁后油价上升
zh.summary: 美国对德黑兰的新军事打击和对霍尔木兹海峡附近伊朗港口重新实施海上封锁后，油价上升。这一军事升级在关键能源枢纽造成了供应中断的担忧。

title: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
summary: Drones and autonomous systems are transitioning from specialized military tools to essential components of modern warfare in Europe. European nations are increasing investment as military doctrine evolves to reflect changing conflict strategies.
content: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.

zh.title: 欧洲为何突然大举投资无人机
zh.summary: 无人机和自主系统正在从专门的军事工具过渡到欧洲现代战争的必要组成部分。随着军事学说的演变以反映不断变化的冲突战略，欧洲国家正在增加投资。

title: Stripe, Advent offer to buy PayPal for more than $53 billion: Reuters
summary: Stripe and Advent International made a joint bid to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc at $60.50 per share, valuing the payments company at over $53 billion. The offer would represent a major consolidation in the digital payments industry.
content: Stripe and Advent International have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.

zh.title: Stripe和Advent报价超过530亿美元收购PayPal：路透社
zh.summary: Stripe和Advent International联合出价以每股60.50美元收购PayPal Holdings公司，价值超过530亿美元。这一要约将代表数字支付行业的重大整合。

title: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
summary: China's economic growth missed its target due to weak domestic demand and higher oil prices from the Iran war, despite strong export performance. This signals challenges for the world's second-largest economy amid geopolitical tensions.
content: Weak demand domestically and the impact of the Iran war on oil prices overshadowed the country's strong exports.

zh.title: 中国经济增长大幅下滑，未能达到目标
zh.summary: 由于国内需求疲软和伊朗战争导致的油价上升，中国经济增长未能达到目标，尽管出口表现强劲。这预示着全球第二大经济体在地缘政治紧张局势中面临挑战。

title: China posts slowest GDP growth since 2022 at 4.3%, missing expectations
summary: China's second-quarter GDP growth of 4.3% fell short of its 4.5-5% annual target, marking the slowest pace since 2022. The underperformance highlights economic headwinds despite Beijing's lowest growth target in decades.
content: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

zh.title: 中国GDP增速降至4.3%，创2022年以来新低，未能达到预期
zh.summary: 中国第二季度GDP增速为4.3%，未能达到4.5%-5%的年度目标，创2022年以来的最低增速。尽管北京的增长目标创下数十年来新低，但这种表现不佳反映出经济面临逆风。

title: Stock futures are flat after soft inflation reading lifts market: Live updates
summary: Stock markets rallied Tuesday following a lower-than-expected inflation report, which has raised investor hopes that the Federal Reserve may moderate its interest rate hikes. This economic data point provides some relief to equities amid rate-hiking concerns.
content: Stocks climbed Tuesday after a cooler-than-expected inflation report bolstered hopes that the Fed may not need to raise interest rates as aggressively.

zh.title: 疲软通胀数据推高市场后股指期货持平：实时更新
zh.summary: 周二股市在通胀数据低于预期后上涨，这提高了投资者对美联储可能温和加息的预期。这一经济数据点在加息担忧中为股市提供了一些缓解。

title: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 11% as Asia tech stocks rally
summary: SK Hynix shares surged 11% as Asian tech stocks rallied, following a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after recent declines. The recovery suggests renewed investor confidence in the semiconductor sector after a week of selloffs.
content: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.

zh.title: SK海力士股价上涨11% 亚洲科技股反弹
zh.summary: SK海力士股价上涨11%，随着美国芯片股在近期下跌后反弹，亚洲科技股也随之上扬。这种反弹表明投资者对半导体行业重新获得信心，该行业之前经历了一周的抛售。

title: U.S. strikes Iran before Hormuz Strait blockade restarts
summary: The U.S. has struck Iran as the ceasefire agreement appears to have ended following multiple recent hostilities in the region. President Trump has confirmed the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is no longer in effect, escalating tensions in the Middle East.
content: President Donald Trump has said the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over following multiple flare-ups of hostilities in the region.

zh.title: 美国在霍尔木兹海峡封锁重启前对伊朗发动打击
zh.summary: 随着该地区多次敌对行动后停火协议似乎已结束，美国对伊朗发动了打击。特朗普总统已确认美国-伊朗停火协议已经失效，中东地区局势紧张局面加剧。

title: Xbox workers stunned after jobs 'bloodbath'
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division is cutting 3,200 jobs, marking a significant workforce reduction in the gaming industry. The layoffs raise questions about whether this represents a strategic reset or a sign of deeper challenges in the gaming business.
content: The video game giant owned by Microsoft plans to let 3,200 workers go. Will it be a big reset or a system crash?

zh.title: Xbox员工在大规模裁员后感到震惊
zh.summary: 微软Xbox部门裁减3200个工作岗位，这是游戏产业的重大劳动力削减。这些裁员引发了人们的质疑，不知道这是否代表战略调整还是游戏业务面临更深层次挑战的信号。
